programs.title: On the Buses
programs.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan loses his wages at the dog track and is unable to pay housekeeping money to his mum.

programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Bob begs Viv to keep fighting her case when she tells him she is going to change her plea in court. Paul and Nicola accidentally use Diane's clothes to make their quilt.

programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Nicola and Paul replace the clothes they used in the quilt and luckily Diane sees the funny side - but a text from Jonny halts the merriment.

programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Michelle gets a dressing-down from Dan in front of a packed pub. Vernon broaches the subject of a business venture with Liz, and Ted tries to clean up the Platts' house.

programs.title: Classic Coronation Street
programs.desc: Liz fails to muster up the same enthusiasm as Vernon when they view the new bar. Michelle asks Becky to take over from Leanne in the Rovers.

programs.title: Inspector Morse
programs.desc: When tragedy strikes in his own family, Morse's investigation into the death of a bright young girl leads him into an alien world of raves and smart drugs.
